inputs.text: Mujhe bahut tezi se bukhar chadha hai, sareer dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Sudden onset fever and body ache

inputs.text: Meri aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and joint pain are common symptoms

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain is a key symptom of Dengue

inputs.text: Mere bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikaal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Classic symptoms of Dengue: retro-orbital pain, rash, and bleeding gums

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Rash and bleeding gums are not typical symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with cyclical fever and chills

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, petechiae nikaal aaye hain

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Confirmation of Dengue: petechiae and severe weakness

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to presence of petechiae and severe weakness

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of cyclical fever and chills
